text_content: IIT Gandhinagar | Home Contact A+ A A- A English हिंदी Internal Services Internal Website (IWS) Webmail Career Development Services Scholarships and Financial Aid Institute Management System (IMS) Medical Centre Guest House Internal Complaints Committee IITGN Counseling Service Library RTI ISTF List of Holidays Subscribe Research Addressing global challenges through interdisciplinary inquiry and scientific innovation. Events A curated calendar of academic conferences, workshops, and vibrant cultural activities. News Latest announcements, achievements, and updates from the IITGN community. Thinking Across Boundaries At IIT Gandhinagar, research is embedded in everyday learning and crosses disciplinary boundaries to address complex questions. By working at such intersections, students and faculty allow for new perspectives to shape research methods, outputs, and outcomes. Watch Video About IITGN In The Spotlight Research Publication IITGN launches AI Resilience & Command (ARC) Centre As Indian cities grapple with increasingly frequent floods, climate extremes, and mounting infrastructure stress, the Indian Institute of Technology Gandhinagar (IITGN) has launched its AI Resilience and Command (ARC) Centre on February 05, 2026. Located at the IITGN Research Park, the Centre promotes data-driven climate-risk management, combining flood forecasting, mobility analysis and AI-enabled decision support to help cities anticipate and respond to extreme events. CCL blends classic gameplay with innovative design; Stories published by Times of India , Ahmedabad Mirror , Skilloutlook From Conservation to Economy: IFS Officers Learn Blue Ecology from IITGN Indian Institute of Technology Gandhinagar held a session for IFS officers on Blue Ecology, focusing on water conservation and sustainable ecosystem management. Facilities State-of-the-art research infrastructure enabling high-quality scientific exploration. Centres Collaborative research in science, engineering, and social sciences. Homecoming 2025 Every December, IIT Gandhinagar alumni from around the world come together to celebrate their shared journey — to relive old memories, create new ones, and rediscover the Institute that shaped who they are today. Homecoming is a celebration of this collective experience. It is the laughter echoing through hostel corridors, the late-night brainstorming sessions that turned into life lessons, and the friendships that time could never fade. Know more Student Life At IIT Gandhinagar, living and learning are closely integrated. The residential campus supports academic excellence while offering avenues for cultural expression, technical exploration, and creative growth. Campus Life Sustainable housing and hygienic dining facilities for an enriching residential experience. Sports and Recreation Access to a state-of-the-art sports complex, diverse clubs, and vibrant student events. Well Being Holistic support and initiatives for mental, physical, and emotional wellness. Innovation & Incubation By supporting over 90 startups, hosting 40+ companies, and advancing 100+ patent filings, the Innovation and Entrepreneurship Center and Research Park at IITGN actively advance industry collaboration and technology commercialisation. International Relations In 2025, IITGN signed 10+ MoUs with leading global universities, engaged with 40+ international institutions and agencies, conducted multiple joint international workshops, and expanded its academic network across Asia, the USA, and Africa.
